examples.title: Using String Built-in Functions
examples.description: Demonstrates common string manipulation functions from string.h
examples.explanation: This program demonstrates four essential string functions: strlen() returns string length, strcpy() copies one string to another, strcat() appends one string to another, and strcmp() compares two strings lexicographically.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) for each function where n is string length

examples.title: Dynamic Memory Allocation with malloc and free
examples.description: Shows how to allocate and free memory dynamically using built-in functions
examples.explanation: This program demonstrates dynamic memory allocation using malloc() which allocates specified bytes at runtime. It shows how to check for allocation failure (NULL), use the allocated memory, and properly free it using free() to prevent memory leaks.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) for reading and displaying n elements
examples.spaceComplexity: O(n) for the dynamically allocated array

examples.title: Random Number Generation with srand and rand
examples.description: Demonstrates random number generation using built-in functions
examples.explanation: This program shows random number generation. srand() seeds the random number generator - using time(NULL) gives different sequences each run. rand() generates pseudo-random numbers. Using modulo (%) with +1 scales the range to desired values. Fixed seed produces reproducible sequences.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) for generating n random numbers

examples.title: Character Classification Functions from ctype.h
examples.description: Demonstrates character classification and conversion functions
examples.explanation: This program demonstrates character functions from ctype.h. Classification functions (isalpha, isdigit, etc.) return non-zero for true and zero for false. Conversion functions (toupper, tolower) transform individual characters. The string loop converts entire string to uppercase.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) where n is number of characters processed
